title: valantia muralis subvar. aculeata
intro: Valantia muralis subvar. aculeata, also known as the prickly valerian or prickly valeriana, is a subvariety of the Valeriana officinalis plant, which is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Valantia muralis subvar. aculeata include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Valantia muralis subvar. aculeata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
